form.layout: =========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== code[编码] orgId[业务组织] partnerId[关联伙伴] partnerName[伙伴名称] status[状态] =========>protocol[协议]====== protocol[传输协议] transportEndpoint[传输端点] authMethod[认证方式] webhookSecret[Webhook密钥] timezone[时区] =========>cert[证书]====== certExpiry[证书过期日期] certFingerprint[证书指纹] allowedFormats[支持格式(JSON)] =========>contact[联系人]====== contactName[联系人姓名] contactEmail[联系邮箱] contactPhone[联系电话] =========>lifecycle[生命周期]====== goLiveDate[上线日期] archivedAt[归档日期] notes[备注] ========^audit[审计信息]========= createdBy[创建人] createTime[创建时间] updatedBy[修改人] updateTime[修改时间]

=========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== code[编码] orgId[业务组织] partnerId[关联伙伴] partnerName[伙伴名称] status[状态] =========>protocol[协议]====== protocol[传输协议] transportEndpoint[传输端点] authMethod[认证方式] webhookSecret[Webhook密钥] timezone[时区] =========>cert[证书]====== certExpiry[证书过期日期] certFingerprint[证书指纹] allowedFormats[支持格式(JSON)] =========>contact[联系人]====== contactName[联系人姓名] contactEmail[联系邮箱] contactPhone[联系电话] =========>lifecycle[生命周期]====== goLiveDate[上线日期] archivedAt[归档日期] notes[备注](2) ========^audit[审计信息]========= createdBy[创建人] createTime[创建时间] updatedBy[修改人] updateTime[修改时间]

form.title: 查询条件

action.label: 上线
action.confirmText: 确认将此合作伙伴上线到生产环境？
